English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ripon Society records
Ripon Society
2824
24.1 cubic feet. 24.1 cubic feet.
1963-1978. Includes correspondence, research projects, civil rights material, reports, fund raising material, programs, minutes of meetings, financial records, memoranda, press releases, newsletters, publications, correspondence and other material related to various Republican organizations, mailings to potential contributors and subscribers, membership records, research materials and papers, clippings, and other records of the Ripon Society. Also records of the Ripon Society collected by Howard F. Gillette, Jr. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 39 38 36 35 34 33 31 37 41 43 44 45 46 47 48 49 50 51 54 53 52 ======= 39 38 36 35 34 33 31 37 41 43 44 45 46 47 48 49 50 51 54 53 52 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2067771
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
EAD encoding:
Evan Fay Earle, September 2007
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, research projects, civil rights material, reports, fund raising material, programs, minutes of meetings, financial records, memoranda, press releases, newsletters, publications, correspondence and other material related to various Republican organizations, mailings to potential contributors and subscribers, membership records, research materials and papers, clippings, and other records of the Ripon Society. Also records of the Ripon Society collected by Howard F. Gillette, Jr.
Cite As:
Ripon Society records, #2824. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to all additions to the collection restricted for 10 years from the date of arrival at Cornell with the exception of publications and news releases. Access to Boxes 31-53 restricted until November 2019.
Politics, Practical. Republican Party
